name: python3-jmespath
title: python3-jmespath
description:
JSON Matching Expressions (Python 3)
JMESPath is python library which allows you to declaratively specify how
to extract elements from a JSON document.
.
This package contains the module for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jmespath because JSON Matching Expressions (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jmespath as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jmespath with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jmespath --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
